title: tillandsia subandina
intro: Tillandsia subandina is a species of epiphytic air plant that belongs to the Bromeliaceae family, known for its unique ability to absorb moisture and nutrients through its leaves rather than roots. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tillandsia subandina are thought to include the reduction of stress, improvement of respiratory conditions, and enhanced immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in traditional remedies.
